overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a gothic stone corridor with arched ceilings and stained glass windows, passing a character in wizard robes, and entering a large dormitory room with four-poster beds. The environment features atmospheric fog, ornate metal railings, and warm wall sconces contrasting with cool natural light filtering through the glass ceiling.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow gothic corridor with high arched ceilings featuring stained glass windows. The camera walks steadily forward along a stone-tiled path, flanked by ornate metal railings and illuminated by warm wall sconces contrasting with the cool natural light from above. Atmospheric fog fills the space, and the stone walls show aged textures with moss growth.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone corridor with stained glass ceiling

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the corridor as another character passes by

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera and passing by on the left side

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking through the corridor as a character wearing dark wizard robes with a house crest approaches from the distance, walks past the camera on the left side, and continues down the corridor behind. The environment remains consistent with the previous segment, maintaining the atmospheric fog and gothic architecture.

events.description: camera turns right toward a large wooden door at corridor end

agents.ego_description: walking down the corridor toward a junction where a side corridor meets

entered.detail: arched opening leading to another corridor section

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds down the corridor, passing the area where the character was encountered. A side corridor arch becomes visible on the right side as the camera approaches an intersection. The stained glass ceiling continues overhead, and the atmospheric fog persists throughout the stone passage.

agents.ego_description: approaching the large wooden door at the end of the corridor

entered.detail: ornate dark wood door with metal scrollwork and glass panels
rounded stone arch framing the wooden door
decorative metal plaque mounted on the wall beside the door

segments.scene_description: After turning right, the camera faces a large ornate wooden door at the end of a short vestibule. The stained glass ceiling is now visible to the left, and warm wall sconces illuminate the stone doorway arch. The camera approaches the door, which features decorative metal scrollwork and glass panels showing a forest scene.

events.description: wooden door opens with a magical transition effect revealing the dormitory interior

agents.ego_description: entering the dormitory room and looking around the spacious interior

entered.detail: high ornate stone ceiling with ribbed vaulting
large wooden bed with green canopy curtains
large wooden bed with green canopy curtains
ornate metal stove or fireplace in the center of the room
dark green fabric drapes on the bed posts
dark green fabric drapes on the bed posts

segments.scene_description: The door opens to reveal a spacious gothic dormitory with a high vaulted stone ceiling. Four-poster beds with green canopy curtains line the left and right sides of the room, while an ornate central fireplace sits in the middle. The camera enters and moves forward, taking in the room's stone architecture, wooden chests at the foot of the beds, and warm lighting from wall sconces and table lamps.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a foggy gothic corridor that eventually opens into a grand, warm dormitory. It begins by moving steadily along a stone-tiled path under high arched ceilings, where cool light from stained glass windows contrasts with the glow of wall sconces. As the camera advances through the atmospheric haze, a figure in dark wizard robes passes by on the left before the path leads toward a right-hand intersection. The scene then shifts into a short vestibule, turning toward a large ornate wooden door decorated with metal scrollwork and forest imagery. Finally, the door opens to reveal a spacious dormitory filled with four-poster beds with green canopies and a central fireplace, as the camera glides forward into the warm, vaulted room.
